column1: # Atom superset parser subset. Field 7 records the smaller atom IDs or language
# features intentionally combined by the row.

column3: Module, include, and define form a minimal C-call program.
column4: (module Main)\n(include "math.h")\n(define r (sqrt 16.0))

column3: C include combines with refinement declaration and typed define.
column4:
(module Main)
(include "stdlib.h")
(type Positive { n ∈ Int | (> n 0) })
(define [n :: Positive] (atoi "7"))

column3: Layout declaration combines with constructor call and field access.
column4:
(module Main)
(layout Point [x :: Int] [y :: Int])
(define p (Point 1 2))
(show p.x)

column3: Layout field access combines with map literal values.
column4:
(module Main)
(layout Point [x :: Int] [y :: Int])
(define p (Point 1 2))
(define m #{:x p.x :y p.y})

column3: Layout constructor values combine with array literals.
column4: (module Main)\n(layout Point [x :: Int] [y :: Int])\n(define points [(Point 0 0) (Point 1 1)])

column3: Layout constructor values combine with set literals.
column4: (module Main)\n(layout Point [x :: Int] [y :: Int])\n(define points {(Point 0 0) (Point 1 1)})

column3: Map literals combine ratio and percentage values.
column4: (module Main)\n(define rates #{:half 1/2 :vat 22% :third 0.(3)})

column3: Map literals combine nested array and set values.
column4: (module Main)\n(define cfg #{:ports [80 443] :flags {True False}})

column3: Cond combines map predicate and lookup body.
column4: (module Main)\n(define cfg #{:enabled True})\n(cond [(Map? cfg) (find cfg :enabled)] [else False])

column3: Match combines with layout field access.
column4:
(module Main)
(layout Point [x :: Int] [y :: Int])
(define p (Point 1 2))
(match p.x with 1 -> p.y _ -> 0)

column3: Typed lambda combines with map lookup.
column4: (module Main)\n(define cfg #{:value 3})\n((lambda ([m : Map] -> Int) (find m :value)) cfg)

column3: Typed lambda combines with refinement-annotated value.
column4:
(module Main)
(type Positive { n ∈ Int | (> n 0) })
(define [n :: Positive] 3)
((lambda ([x : Int] -> Int) (+ x 1)) n)

column3: Data constructor combines with map payload.
column4: (module Main)\n(data Packet | Packet Map | Empty)\n(define p (Packet #{:id 1 :ok True}))

column3: Data match combines with refinement-annotated value.
column4:
(module Main)
(data MaybeInt | None | Some Int)
(type Positive { n ∈ Int | (> n 0) })
(define [n :: Positive] 5)
(match (Some n) with (Some x) -> x _ -> 0)

column3: Class and instance declarations combine with value definition.
column4:
(module Main)
(class Eq a where (=) :: a -> a -> Bool)
(instance Eq Int)
(define n 1)

column3: Import alias combines with map literal.
column4: (module Main)\n(import Foo [bar :as baz])\n(define cfg #{:value baz})

column3: Module export list combines with layout constructor value.
column4: (module Main [run])\n(layout Result [ok :: Bool])\n(define run (Result True))

column3: Feature conditional combines with include and fallback expression.
column4:
(module Main)
#+LINUX
(include "math.h")
#---
(show 1)

column3: Feature conditional combines with refinement declaration.
column4:
(module Main)
#+LINUX
(type LinuxOnly { n ∈ Int | (> n 0) })
#---
(show 1)

column3: Quote combines with map-shaped syntax.
column4: (module Main)\n(quote (define cfg #{:a 1 :b 2}))

column3: Quasiquote combines with refinement-shaped syntax.
column4: (module Main)\n⌜type Positive { n ∈ Int | (> n 0) }⌝

column3: Address-of field sugar combines with map literal.
column4:
(module Main)
(layout Node [id :: Int])
(define n (Node 1))
(define refs #{:id &n.id})

column3: Array ranges combine with map literal values.
column4: (module Main)\n(define ranges #{:small [0..3] :odd [1,3..9]})

column3: Heap array value combines with refinement declaration.
column4: (module Main)\n(type NonEmptyArr { xs ∈ Arr | (> (count xs) 0) })\n(define xs ~[1 2 3])

column3: Wisp size-array sugar combines with C include.
column4: module Main\ninclude "stdint.h"\ndefine buf :: [1kb U8]

column3: Wisp layout declaration combines with constructor and map literal.
column4:
module Main

layout Point
  [x :: Int]
  [y :: Int]
define p Point 1 2
define cfg #{:x p.x :y p.y}

column3: Wisp refinement declaration combines with typed define.
column4:
module Main

type Positive { n ∈ Int | (> n 0) }
define [n :: Positive] 3
show n

column3: Wisp if combines with percentage/ratio comparison.
column4:
module Main

define half 50%
if half = 1/2
  show "half"
  show "other"

column3: Wisp for combines with map keys.
column4:
module Main

define cfg #{:a 1 :b 2}
for k -> keys cfg
  show k

column3: Wisp quote combines with list literal syntax.
column4:
module Main

define xs '(1 2 3)
show xs

column3: Let binding combines map literal and percentage value.
column4: (module Main)\n(let [rates #{:half 50%}] (find rates :half))

column3: When combines with refinement-annotated value.
column4:
(module Main)
(type Positive { n ∈ Int | (> n 0) })
(define [n :: Positive] 3)
(when (> n 0) (show n))

column3: Unless combines with map missing-key predicate.
column4: (module Main)\n(define cfg #{:a 1})\n(unless (contains? cfg :b) (show "missing"))

column3: While combines layout field access and mutation.
column4:
(module Main)
(layout Counter [n :: Int])
(define c (Counter 0))
(while (< c.n 3) (set! c.n (+ c.n 1)))

column3: For combines an array of layout constructor values.
column4: (module Main)\n(layout Item [id :: Int])\n(for [item [(Item 1) (Item 2)]] item.id)

column3: Type alias combines with layout field type.
column4: (module Main)\n(type UserId Int)\n(layout User [id :: UserId] [name :: String])

column3: Type alias declaration combines with map value.
column4: (module Main)\n(type UserId Int)\n(define user #{:id 1 :name "ada"})

column3: Refinement metadata combines with layout field type.
column4: (module Main)\n(type Positive { n ∈ Int | (> n 0) } :doc "positive" :alias Natural)\n(layout Score [value :: Positive])

column3: Radix literals combine with refinement predicate and layout.
column4: (module Main)\n(type Byteish { n ∈ Int | (and (>= n 2r0) (<= n 16rFF)) })\n(layout Packet [tag :: Byteish])

column3: String predicate refinement combines with import alias.
column4: (module Main)\n(import Strings [trim :as str-trim])\n(type Route { s ∈ String | (and (starts-with? s "/") (not (contains? s " "))) })

column3: C math include combines with layout float fields.
column4:
(module Main)
(include "math.h")
(layout Vec [x :: Float] [y :: Float])
(define len (sqrt 16.0))

column3: C include combines with class declaration.
column4: (module Main)\n(include "stdint.h")\n(class Show a where show :: a -> String)

column3: Map count combines with cond clauses.
column4: (module Main)\n(define cfg #{:a 1})\n(cond [(> (count cfg) 0) "nonempty"] [else "empty"])

column3: Map count combines with match expression.
column4: (module Main)\n(define cfg #{:a 1 :b 2})\n(match (count cfg) with 0 -> "empty" _ -> "some")

column3: Array literal combines with ratio values inside a map.
column4: (module Main)\n(define cfg #{:weights [1/2 1/3 1/6]})

column3: Set literal combines with keyword values inside map.
column4: (module Main)\n(define cfg #{:modes {:fast :safe}})

column3: Typed lambda combines data constructor and match.
column4: (module Main)\n(data MaybeInt | None | Some Int)\n((lambda ([x : Int] -> Int) (match (Some x) with (Some y) -> y _ -> 0)) 3)

column3: Typed lambda combines with a bound range array argument.
column4: (module Main)\n(define xs [0..3])\n((lambda ([ys : Arr] -> Arr) ys) xs)

column3: Nested layout constructor values combine in one declaration group.
column4:
(module Main)
(layout Point [x :: Int] [y :: Int])
(layout Box [min :: Point] [max :: Point])
(define b (Box (Point 0 0) (Point 10 10)))

column3: Refinement combines nested boolean predicate and percentage literal.
column4: (module Main)\n(type Discount { r ∈ Ratio | (and (>= r 0%) (or (= r 0%) (< r 100%))) })
